name: Derry Stone Top Mixed Material Kitchen Island Brown - Threshold™: Solid Hardwood, Storage, Wheels
description: Expand your serving and countertop space with the Derry Stone Top Mixed-Material Kitchen Island from Threshold™. Boasting a solid hardwood construction, metallic frame and stone tabletop, this brown kitchen island offers versatile, long-lasting use. It can be used for prepping and cooking, or as a table perfect for serving guests snacks. It even comes with additional storage space for your essentials, along with being on wheels for easy mobility around the kitchen.
